description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a whimsical animal, possibly a bear or mouse, with a rounded head, upright ears, and a plump body. The toy is primarily light purple with contrasting mint green accents on its belly, nose, inner ears, and a heart-shaped patch on its back. Its facial features include black, oval eyes and thick, arched eyebrows, giving it a slightly mischievous or stern expression. The arms and legs are short and rounded, with the left arm showing a small patch of white, suggesting a repair or design detail. The surface texture appears to be soft and slightly ribbed, typical of fabric plush toys. The overall appearance is friendly and inviting, suitable for children or as a decorative item in urban parks or playgrounds.
description: A light purple plush toy with mint green accents, rounded ears, and a heart-shaped patch on its back. It has a soft, ribbed texture and a slightly stern facial expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the toy's face with black eyes, arched eyebrows, mint green nose, and a mint green belly patch.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, protruding nose, and a visible white patch on the upper arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, rounded body, and a large mint green heart-shaped patch.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head and body, with the right arm and leg visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: cartoon bear or mouse with mint green accents
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression appears stern or slightly mischievous, with thick, arched black eyebrows and oval black eyes. The mouth is a small, subtle line, giving the toy a serious look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both arms slightly outstretched and legs extended forward. The head is held high, and the ears are upright.
